//: Report-only type-check configuration. The codebase is JavaScript with
JSDoc annotations rather than TypeScript, so `checkJs` currently reports
well over a thousand findings that are mostly missing parameter
annotations rather than defects. Making this a blocking gate would
require a typed-JSDoc migration, which belongs in its own issue.
CI runs `npm run typecheck` without failing the build so the number stays
visible and can be driven down deliberately. Run it locally before
opening a PR that touches shared library code.
